narrative:
Lancaster City 6-C (precinct in Fairfield County) has 984 registered voters, with 65.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
